subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sadiq! Say: By God, the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree hath been raised, and the lights of the Countenance have shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل صادق قل تالله قد ارتفع حفیف السدره و اشرقت انوار الوجه من الافق
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
